description:
Resolve fz2 source-surface failures from the fz-rh2.9 sweep: keyword_lists, no_parens_call, no_parens_do, no_parens_keyword, sample_tests, sample_tests_module.

These are above the artifact seam: unsupported compiler2 front-door prefixes for keyword/no-parens source forms, item-level test macro handling, and test module main/root policy.

Signal: each surface is either supported through normal source expansion and fixture-matrix fz2 paths, or explicitly declared outside the compiler2 cutover contract.
title: Fix fz2 source-surface parser and item macro gaps
